stylePrompt: Create a completely original Gallery Style lighting product that treats light as a curatorial instrument and the lamp itself as a collectible object. Prioritize precise beam control, visual restraint, museum-grade detailing, and a silhouette strong enough to stand alone in an open space. Use contrast between illuminated subject and quiet background. The design should support focusing, aiming, dimming, and glare control without looking merely technical.
specificElements: A narrow-beam head with a clean snoot
A frame-like body defining an illuminated void
A dark housing that visually disappears around the beam
